global.description: The ad features a bold red background with geometric shapes and prominent text.
global.main_message: Stream the hype with a call to action to claim a reward.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangular shape with a circular element overlapping it, both in a lighter shade, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Stream the hype
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Stream the hype' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Cancel anytime
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Cancel anytime', providing additional information.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The logo 'PulsePlay' is displayed in a bold font at the top left corner, contrasting against the red background.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Additional circles
elements.description: Two small circular shapes in a lighter color, positioned near the center, adding visual interest.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bold and vibrant, key elements include geometric shapes and a call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: PulsePlay, Stream the hype, Cancel anytime, Claim reward, UGC
